name: Reworkd
description: Reworkd is an AI-powered web data extraction platform that originated from AgentGPT (~32K GitHub stars). Pivoted from general autonomous agents to enterprise web scraping. Uses Tarsier vision-language library for page understanding. Targets market research, lead generation, competitive intelligence, and supply chain data aggregation.
oneLiner: AI agents for automated web data extraction and structured data collection at enterprise scale.
pricing: Contact sales for enterprise. AgentGPT free/open-source for self-hosting.
capabilities: AI web data extraction with NL schema definitions
Structured data from unstructured web pages

uxAnalysis.builderFlow: Define extraction targets by specifying URLs and describing data schema in natural language. AI agents navigate pages, interpret content using Tarsier vision models, extract structured records. Flow: define schema -> provide URLs -> run extraction -> review/export. Early-stage interface prioritizes accuracy over builder polish.
strengths: NL schema definition lowers barrier for non-technical users
Tarsier vision-based understanding handles dynamic/complex pages
Batch extraction at scale for high-volume use cases
weaknesses: No team collaboration, RBAC, or multi-tenant
notableFeatures: Tarsier: vision-language library converting screenshots to tagged text for LLM reasoning
Schema-driven extraction: define output structure, AI figures out how to populate from web pages
AgentGPT: pioneered goal-decomposition autonomous agent pattern

recentDevelopments: 2024: Pivoted from AgentGPT to enterprise web data extraction
Shifted positioning from 'autonomous agents for everyone' to 'AI web extraction at scale'

subCriteria.name: Agent Builder UX
subCriteria.rationale: Web UI for schema definition and target URLs. NL descriptions guide behavior. Functional not polished.

subCriteria.name: Time-to-Value
subCriteria.rationale: Basic extraction previews. Limited failure trace visualization.

subCriteria.name: Debugging & Testing
subCriteria.rationale: Sparse and evolving. AgentGPT has community guides. Enterprise docs have gaps.

subCriteria.name: Documentation & Learning
subCriteria.rationale: Schema changes apply quickly. No hot-reload preview or version DAG.

subCriteria.name: Multi-Agent Coordination
subCriteria.rationale: Parallel extraction jobs. AgentGPT had sub-task decomposition. No true multi-agent with shared state.

subCriteria.name: Human-in-the-Loop Design
subCriteria.rationale: No structured handoff. Configure and review results.

subCriteria.name: Workflow Templates
subCriteria.rationale: No team workspaces or collaborative editing.

subCriteria.name: Team Development
subCriteria.rationale: Limited extraction pattern templates. No marketplace.

subCriteria.name: Native Connectors
subCriteria.rationale: CSV/JSON export. Basic API. No native CRM/warehouse connectors.

subCriteria.name: API & Protocol Standards
subCriteria.rationale: REST API for job management. No MCP, GraphQL, or event architecture.

subCriteria.name: Authentication & Access
subCriteria.rationale: Basic API key auth. No SAML/SSO or enterprise IAM.

subCriteria.name: Data Pipeline & RAG
subCriteria.rationale: Tarsier for visual page understanding. Schema-driven extraction. No RAG/vector store.

subCriteria.name: Guardrails & Kill Switches
subCriteria.rationale: Job cancellation. Rate limiting for target policies. No behavioral monitoring.

subCriteria.name: Audit Trail & Compliance
subCriteria.rationale: No structured approval. Post-extraction review only.

subCriteria.name: RBAC & Access Control
subCriteria.rationale: Minimal audit trail. No SOC2. No immutable logging.

subCriteria.name: Explainability & Transparency
subCriteria.rationale: Basic accounts. No RBAC, teams, or SSO.

subCriteria.name: Deployment Flexibility
subCriteria.rationale: SaaS primary. AgentGPT self-hostable via Docker. No K8s enterprise deployment.

subCriteria.name: Scaling & Monitoring
subCriteria.rationale: Early-stage scaling. Moderate concurrent jobs. No hyperscale proof points.

subCriteria.name: Cost Management
subCriteria.rationale: Basic job status dashboards. No enterprise observability integration.

subCriteria.name: Ecosystem Maturity
subCriteria.rationale: AgentGPT ~32K stars. Strong awareness. Enterprise base limited.

scoringRationale: Reworkd scores 42/100. Strong tech foundations (Tarsier, AgentGPT heritage) but early-stage product. Builder (10) functional not polished. Deployment (7), Integration (8), Governance (6) all limited. Community recognition (32K stars) offset by pre-seed funding uncertainty.
targetUser: Teams extracting structured data from websites

walkthrough.title: Structured Data Extraction from Product Catalogs

steps.title: Define Your Data Schema
steps.description: Specify what data you need extracted — product name, SKU, price, description, specifications, availability. Reworkd's schema builder lets you define the exact output structure with field types, validation rules, and required/optional flags.

steps.title: Provide Target URLs or Upload Pages
steps.description: Point Reworkd at product catalog URLs, or upload HTML pages directly. The platform handles pagination, infinite scroll, and dynamic content loading — no need to reverse-engineer JavaScript-rendered pages.

steps.title: Tarsier Vision Model Processes Pages
steps.description: Reworkd's Tarsier vision-language model reads pages like a human — understanding visual layout, table structures, and contextual relationships between elements. It extracts data even from non-standard layouts that traditional scrapers miss.

steps.title: Review and Validate Extracted Data
steps.description: Preview extracted data in a spreadsheet-like interface. Flag incorrect entries, and Reworkd learns from corrections to improve accuracy on subsequent pages. Confidence scores highlight fields that may need human review.

steps.title: Export and Integrate
steps.description: Export clean, structured data as CSV, JSON, or push directly to your database via API. Schedule recurring extractions to keep your product data current. Monitor extraction accuracy and volume over time.
